context_for_next_testing_agent: Osstem drilling protocols fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: OSSTEM_PROTOCOLS dict at line 4762, OSSTEM_TS_IV_PROTOCOLS dict at line 4770, _generate_osstem_protocol function at line 4796. Protocol rules: (1) D1 = Full drilling + cortical drill (coronal only), (2) D2 = Standard full drilling with 1mm subcrestal placement, (3) D3/D4 = Under-prep (skip final drill) with at bone level placement, (4) TS IV = Fixed simplified protocol regardless of bone type, (5) Insertion torque ~40 Ncm. DB system names: 'ETIII NH', 'MS', 'SS III', 'TS III', 'TS IV'. Brand is 'Osstem'. Standard systems (ETIII NH, MS, SS III, TS III) share OSSTEM_PROTOCOLS. TS IV uses OSSTEM_TS_IV_PROTOCOLS.
